reason: Welink telemetry is a fire-and-forget side path; preserve executor, conditional bean, soft-disable, and no-business-impact rules.
Use existing log prefixes and avoid printing secrets or full payloads on skill-server telemetry failures.
Follow existing DTO/Jackson null handling and model conventions when adding telemetry payload fields.
Cloud remote routing and assistant-instance contracts live in ai-gateway service/cloud conventions.
Remote call input logging must use existing EXT_CALL semantics and SensitiveDataMasker where needed.
Preserve GatewayMessage/JsonNode conventions while logging remote invoke body and headers.
The telemetry fields depend on session/chat metadata and assistant info across boundaries.
Search before adding helpers or duplicating existing assistant info and log masking behavior.
